description: Firm Stress Desk - re-prices the firm book through 15 scenarios (historical replays + macro shocks) via cached six-factor loadings, attributes each loss by desk / sector / name and runs a reverse stress test. data/firm-stress.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm Stress Desk - daily 03:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the Factor Risk Model publishes at 02:30 so the per-name factor loadings cache is fresh.
